Demo Pricing Roadmap Sign In

Modern Presentations
in Your Browser

ShowTime Lite is a cloud-based slide creation tool that lets you design stunning presentations with real-time preview and export capabilities. No install required – just create, collaborate, and share.

Try Demo View Pricing

Interactive Demo

See ShowTime Lite in action with a static preview.

Launch Interactive Demo

Roadmap

ShowTime Lite already supports local creation and cloud organization. The next milestones focus on offline use, collaboration, and smarter templates.

Available today

Editor and cloud workspace

  • Canvas editor
  • Rich components
  • Presentation and export
  • Cloud workspaces
  • Project tree
  • Folder organization

Later

Upcoming milestones

  • Q3 2026 Desktop app with offline support
  • Q4 2026 Real-time collaboration
  • 2027 Custom themes and AI-powered templates

Pricing and access

Build rich slides, diagrams, charts, and visual stories in the browser. Start locally for free, then upgrade for cloud project organization and feedback workflows.

✦

Free

Local creation

$0

For trying ShowTime Lite and building browser-local decks.

  • ✓ Guest workspace at /guest with browser-local save
  • ✓ Canvas editor with drag-and-drop slide building
  • ✓ Rich components: text, code, images, charts, diagrams, shapes, tables, maps, and timelines
  • ✓ Multiple pages, presentation mode, dark and light themes
  • ✓ Export presentations as images or JSON
  • ✓ In-app features and usage guide
Start Free
▣

Plus

Cloud organization

Soon

For signed-in users managing multiple cloud projects.

  • ✓ Account workspace at /app with Convex cloud sync
  • ✓ Multiple persistent cloud slide deck projects
  • ✓ Project tree with root folders, subfolders, projects, and slides
  • ✓ Nested folders up to three levels with clear validation
  • ✓ Tree and thumbnail views with clickable breadcrumbs
  • ✓ Rename, delete, and drag folders, projects, and slides
  • ✓ Limits of 50 projects and 50 slides per project
◆

Pro

Feedback workflow

Soon

For advanced cloud users who need persistence and feedback tracking.

  • ✓ Everything in Plus
  • ✓ Cloud tree persistence for structure, selection, view mode, names, and slide content
  • ✓ Feedback submission from the Help menu for signed-in users
  • ✓ Feedback saved in Convex and submitted to GitHub as issues
  • ✓ Status tracking for pending, failed, open, and addressed feedback
  • ✓ Five feedback entries for non-admin users
  • ✓ Unlimited feedback for configured admin users
